mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PLU_USER WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PLU_USER WHERE NICKNAME = #{nickname}

SELECT USER_ID , NICKNAME , ORIGIN_PROFILE_NAME , CHANGE_PROFILE_NAME , ENROLL_DATE , MODIFY_DATE , ROLE , STATUS FROM PLU_USER LEFT JOIN PROFILE USING(USER_ID) WHERE USER_ID = #{username} AND STATUS = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE PLU_USER SET NICKNAME = #{nickname} , MODIFY_DATE = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND STATUS = 'Y'
mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID , USER_PWD , NICKNAME , ORIGIN_PROFILE_NAME , CHANGE_PROFILE_NAME , ENROLL_DATE , MODIFY_DATE , ROLE , STATUS FROM PLU_USER LEFT JOIN PROFILE USING(USER_ID) WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND STATUS = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE PLU_USER SET USER_PWD = #{userPwd} , MODIFY_DATE = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND STATUS = 'Y'
UPDATE PLU_USER SET STATUS = 'N' , MODIFY_DATE = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND STATUS = 'Y'

MERGE INTO PROFILE USING (SELECT #{userId} , #{originProfileName} , #{changeProfileName} FROM dual) ON (USER_ID = #{userId}) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET ORIGIN_PROFILE_NAME = #{originProfileName} , CHANGE_PROFILE_NAME = #{changeProfileName} WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( USER_ID , ORIGIN_PROFILE_NAME , CHANGE_PROFILE_NAME ) VALUES ( #{userId} , #{originProfileName} , #{changeProfileName} )
